must_detect.matched_text: Conditions precedent: CMA approval, Tadawul notice, ZATCA tax clearance, and post-closing updates to commercial registration and articles; any CMA Market Conduct follow-up will be procedural.

Non-binding term sheet for a minority strategic investment in Noor Logistics CJSC by Al Madar Renewable Holdings CJSC.
Parties: Issuer (Noor Logistics CJSC, CR [2055123456 invalid checksum]) and Investor (Al Madar Renewable Holdings CJSC, CR [0000000000 placeholder]).
Structure: Private placement of new shares under the Companies Law and CMA regulations, processed through Tadawul’s issuer services workflow; no change of control contemplated.
Public information: Evaluation relies solely on Noor Logistics’ audited FY1444H results and past announcements already posted on Tadawul; no MNPI is being provided or relied upon.
Pricing: Final mechanics and share count to be agreed in the CMA-reviewed submission; no amounts are stated in this document.
Conditions precedent: CMA approval, Tadawul notice, ZATCA tax clearance, and post-closing updates to commercial registration and articles; any CMA Market Conduct follow-up will be procedural.
